betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The §6Thermite Torch§f (advancedrocketry:thermitetorch) is a §6single block§f tool that, when placed and ignited, burns at §62000°C§f for §610 minutes§f. It is used to §6weld metal blocks§f together, §6seal pressurized rooms§f, and §6trigger volcanic events§f on certain planets. The torch is a §6deployable item§f — place it, light it with a §6flint and steel§f, and walk away.

§6Production Path (advancedRocketryTweaks.zs:27, replaces "advancedrocketry:thermitetorch")§f:
- Type: §6minecraft:crafting_shapeless§f
- Input: 1x §6hbm:powder_thermite§f (HBM Thermite Powder), 1x §6realistictorches:torch_unlit§f (Unlit Torch), 1x §6realistictorches:matchbox§f (Matchbox)
- Output: 1x §6Thermite Torch§f (advancedrocketry:thermitetorch)
- The CT tweak removes the original `advancedrocketry:thermitetorch` JSON recipe (which used §6stick§f + §6thermite§f) and substitutes the HBM thermite + Unlit Torch + Matchbox

The torch emits a §620-block light radius§f and §6ignites any flammable block§f within §63 blocks§f. It can be used to §6weld metal blocks§f into a single block (right-click two adjacent metal blocks with the torch) which is useful for §6sealing airlocks§f and §6creating pressure-rated§f structures. The torch is consumed on use.

The thermite torch is a prerequisite for the §6Planetary Engineering§f (chain) and the §6Volcanic Planet Mission§f (chain). It is also a §6PvP weapon§f capable of igniting players and dealing §610 HP of fire damage§f per second for 10 minutes.

§cWarning§f: The §6Thermite Torch§f cannot be extinguished once lit — even §6water§f will not put it out. Place it §6far from wooden structures§f or use a §6Force Field Projector§f (10092) to contain the fire. The torch will set §6anything§f within 3 blocks on fire, including §6the player§f.

§eTip§f: For §6airlock sealing§f, place the torch on the §6inner surface§f of the airlock door and light it. The torch welds all §6metal blocks§f in a §63-block radius§f into a single airtight unit. For missions, carry 4-8 torches — they are cheap but consumable.
